hintDisplay: Sujeto: El turista / Verbo: Evitar (pasado simple) / Complemento: Comprar souvenirs / Tiempo: Durante el viaje

correctSentence: The tourist avoided buying souvenirs during the trip.

correctSentence: The traveler enjoys planning their trips months in advance.
